title: shalal #7997
definition:
1) (Qal) to draw out
 2) to spoil, plunder, take spoil
    2a) (Qal) to spoil, plunder
    2b) (Hithpolel) to be spoiled, be plundered
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) (Qal) to draw out
 2) to spoil, plunder, take spoil
    2a) (Qal) to spoil, plunder
    2b) (Hithpolel) to be spoiled, be plundered

    NASB:  to draw out
